caption:
Something new is finding its way to the islands — and it moves like this.

The Lurdes Bergada Spring Summer 2026 collection has arrived at Blink, and it carries exactly the kind of energy we welcome a new season with: quiet confidence, raw textures, and a spirit that refuses to be ordinary. Sculptural silhouettes in natural linens, wide legs that catch the breeze, and a reminder that dressing well has everything to do with how something makes you feel. Swipe through and let it settle.

Jacket: @lurdesbergada_syngmancucala

Trousers: @lurdesbergada_syngmancucala
